jsonld.name: Pedagogical Evasion Ambiguity
jsonld.description: The difficulty distinguishing pedagogically sound withholding from unhelpful evasion during response selection, where the same surface form ("figure it out yourself") can be either crucial cognitive support or lazy dismissal depending on context response mechanisms can't reliably access.
